error_signature: Token has been expired or revoked
title: Google Calendar OAuth2 token expiration issue
symptom: The Google Calendar integration fails with 'Token has been expired or revoked' error, requiring manual re-authentication.
root_cause: When OAuth2 credentials are in testing mode, they have a limited lifespan and require re-authentication every week. This is a restriction imposed by Google to ensure security during the testing phase.
fix_steps: Navigate to the OAuth consent screen
Check if you are in testing mode
Switch to production mode if necessary
agent_instruction: Check the OAuth consent screen in Google Cloud Platform and switch to production mode if you are in testing mode.
